name: elite-x-lyrics
description: Telegram lyrics bot with multi-source fallbacks, Hindi Hinglish transliteration, inline search, and Heroku/VPS deployment support.

WEBHOOK_URL.description: Public HTTPS URL for webhook mode, for example https://your-app.herokuapp.com

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Optional secret token for Telegram webhook verification

RESULT_LIMIT.description: Maximum search results shown in regular chat searches

WEB_CONCURRENCY.description: Keep the bot on a single worker because callback selection state is stored in memory.
